caption: The video features a medical professional, likely a doctor, seated in an office environment. He is wearing a white lab coat with the "Manipal Hospitals" logo and a blue shirt underneath. The setting includes a whiteboard with some writing and diagrams on it, as well as a shelf with papers or files to the left. The doctor appears to be speaking directly to the camera, possibly addressing patients or providing medical advice. His expression changes slightly between the frames, suggesting he is engaged in delivering information or answering questions. The overall atmosphere of the video is professional and informative, typical of a healthcare-related presentation or consultation.
